---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the learning experience or repository structure
title: "[Feature] "

---

## Improvement Idea

Describe the change you want to see.

## Why It Helps

Explain how this improves learning, usability, or maintainability.

## Scope

- lessons
- tools
- docs
- pipeline-site

## Extra Context

Add examples, references, or screenshots if useful.
